title: x-origin Extension Schema (v2)
description: Defines dynamic enum sources for OpenAPI parameters. Specifies which API operation provides the enum values and how to extract both identifiers (values) and display names (labels) from the response.

api.description: URN identifying the source API or MCP server (e.g., 'urn:api:access-management' or 'urn:mcp:exchange')

operation.description: The operationId (for urn:api) or tool name (for urn:mcp) to invoke

values.description: JSONPath expression(s) to extract value(s) from the operation response. Can be a single string or array of strings for multiple extraction paths.

labels.description: JSONPath expression(s) to extract label(s) from the operation response. Must match the structure of 'values' (same type and array length). Optional - if omitted, values are displayed as-is.

examples: Organization GUID from user's accessible orgs
Environment identifier for the selected organization

name.description: Short label for this source in UIs

anyOf.description: v1 deprecated: 'field' has been replaced by 'values' and 'labels'
v1 deprecated: 'note' has been replaced by 'description'
v1 deprecated: 'parameters' should not be duplicated in x-origin
v1 deprecated: 'requiresPathParams' should not be duplicated in x-origin
v1 deprecated: 'requiresSamePathAs' should not be duplicated in x-origin
v1 deprecated: 'alternateOperation' should use multiple source objects instead
v1 deprecated: 'alternateRequiresPathParams' should use multiple source objects instead
v1 deprecated: 'businessGroup' should be expressed using descriptions
v1 deprecated: 'relatedParameters' should be expressed using multiple sources
v1 deprecated: 'semantic' should be clarified in description

examples.name: Organization and Sub-Organizations
examples.description: Extracts both parent organization ID and all sub-organization IDs from the same response
